name: Libertas - Project Idea Generator - Workflow D

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  i.id, i.title, i.tldr, i.summary_bullets, i.deep_dive_markdown,
  i.topics, i.geo, i.freedom_relevance_score, i.credibility_score,
  i.citations, i.status, i.published_url, i.published_at, i.created_at
FROM insights i
WHERE i.status = 'published'
  AND i.freedom_relevance_score >= $1
  AND i.created_at >= $2::timestamptz
  AND i.created_at <= $3::timestamptz
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM project_ideas p
    WHERE i.id = ANY(p.derived_from_insight_ids)
  )
ORDER BY i.freedom_relevance_score DESC, i.created_at DESC
